name: compliance catalog: AI-specific subset includes nist-ai-rmf, eu-ai-act, and eu-ai-act-edpb-guidance (§5 C-1)
command: j="$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/.claude-tdd-pro/COMPLIANCE-URLS.yaml" && grep -qE '^- id: nist-ai-rmf\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: eu-ai-act\s*$' "$j" && grep -qE '^- id: eu-ai-act-edpb-guidance\s*$' "$j" && echo ok 1>&2
